service.name: QueryStats
service.description: Returns remaining query quota. Can also be used to test an account.

service.name: View IP address
service.description: View the IP address of the client in JSON format.

service.name: Extract Sitemap XML as JSON
service.description: Are you looking for an API that can quickly and easily download and parse sitemap.xml files into JSON format? Look no further! Our API allows you to make a simple GET request, passing in the URL of a sitemap.xml file as a parameter. The API will handle the rest, downloading the file, parsing it into a JSON object, and returning the result in the response. And if you need a little extra information to help organize and navigate the URLs in the sitemap, we've got you covered there too. By adding a query parameter to the GET request, you can also include category and breadcrumb information for each URL in the parsed sitemap. Give it a try and see how much easier working with sitemaps can be!

service.name: Keyword Suggestions
service.description: Get keyword suggestions from a keyword seed.

service.name: Requestdeposit
service.description:
# Deposits and Withdrawals
Transactions are requested with `paymentMethodDetails` (details of the transaction, passed to Stronghold) and responses contain `paymentMethodInstructions` (instructions for the user, given by Stronghold) as follows:

## PaymentMethodDetails on Requests

Key | Description | Used In
--- | --- | ---
amount | The amount of the transaction as a string with a maximum of 7 decimal places | Withdrawals for all
withdrawal_address | The venue-specific address for the asset to be withdrawn to | Withdrawals for `bitcoin`, `litecoin`, `ethereum`, `stellar`, and `ripple`
reference | The venue-specific reference to be attached to the withdrawal | Withdrawals for `stellar` and `ripple`
bank_name | The name of the bank, e.g. 'JPMorgan Chase Bank N.A.' | Deposits for `us-ach` and withdrawals for `us-ach` and `us-wire`
bank_routing_number | The routing number of the bank account | Deposits for `us-ach` and withdrawals for `us-ach` and `us-wire`
bank_account_number | The account number of the bank account | Deposits for `us-ach` and withdrawals for `us-ach` and `us-wire`
bank_account_type | The type of bank account, either 'checking' or 'savings' | Deposits and withdrawals for `us-ach`

## PaymentMethodInstructions on Responses

Key | Description | Used In
--- | --- | ---
deposit_address | The venue-specific address that the asset should to be deposited into | Deposits for `bitcoin`, `litecoin`, `ethereum`, `stellar`, and `ripple`
reference | The venue-specific reference that must be attached to the deposit | Deposits for `stellar`, `ripple`, and `us-wire`
interledger_payment_pointer | The Interledger SPSP Payment Pointer used to receive streaming payments in a certain asset | Deposits for `ilp-spsp`
amount | The amount that must be sent for the deposit to succeed | Deposits for `us-wire`
recipient_name | The name of the recipient that the funds should be sent to | Deposits for `us-wire`
recipient_address | The address of the recipient that the funds should be sent to | Deposits for `us-wire`
bank_name | The name of the bank, e.g. 'JPMorgan Chase Bank N.A.' | Deposits for `us-wire`
bank_routing_number | The routing number of the bank account | Deposits for `us-wire`
bank_account_number | The account number of the bank account | Deposits for `us-wire`
bank_swift_code | The SWIFT code to use where the wire is being sent internationally | Deposits for `us-wire`

## Notes

- For `us-ach` and `us-wire`, the name on the bank account must match the name on the entity's Stronghold account.
- `us-ach` deposits take a variable amount of time to be credited to a Stronghold account. Please contact us for more information on the timings for your particular use case.
- The entity must have completed the account verification to use all payment methods with the exception of `ilp-spsp`.

## Request

Field | Type | Description
--- | --- | ---
assetId | string | The identifier of the asset to deposit.
paymentMethod | string | The payment method for the deposit.
paymentMethodDetails | key-value string pairs | (Optional) If required for the deposit method, the details of the deposit.

## Response

Field | Type | Description
--- | --- | ---
result | AccountTransaction | The account transaction. A transaction may not necessarily been created (as seen by the absence of an identifier) but the payment method instructions can be followed to initiate the deposit.
